creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 206814
Update to 878.70.2

Hi,

As net/mDNSResponder has been updated to 878.240.1, so should be the related dns/mDNSResponder_nss port (for which I'm maintainer).

Usual "boring" update for this port as usual, patch is just bumping version and checksums, here is the QA:

/usr/ports/dns/mDNSResponder_nss# portlint 
looks fine.

/usr/ports/dns/mDNSResponder_nss# make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

Thanks,
